dvp_method.description: DvP rankings weighted by season recency. Current season heaviest, prior lighter, two seasons ago minimal. Rank 1 = most yards allowed to position = easiest matchup.

dvp_rank_note: 1 = most yards allowed to this position = easiest matchup
vs_opponent_note: Player history vs this defense over stored window (up to 6 seasons). Small sample (<3 games) is flagged. NFL roster turnover makes this weaker than MLB BvP — treat as supplementary context, not headline data.
